steps.title: Use the narrator's description
steps.content: The narrator says his mother chanted poems in Farsi before bedtime and that he did not need to understand them. His main memory is the feeling of the sound: it was quiet and soothing.

steps.title: Reject invented details
steps.content: Choice A is wrong because the mother recited poems, not made-up stories. Choice B adds background music that is never mentioned. Choice C contradicts the statement that she chanted every night before bedtime. The answer is D.
